rationale: The citing paper studies slow-motion video as a dynamic luxury cue via immersion/hedonic value, while the cited paper studies luxury-brand customization and design-freedom tradeoffs/signaling; this indicates topical overlap on luxury perception but different focal mechanisms and contexts.
